checks.title: Validate the closed replay bundle and record envelopes
Bind the exact historical Surface and Grant to replay scope
Verify record identity, ordering, hashes, and prior links
Reduce one session generation without illegal lifecycle changes
Verify ASP CloudEvent structure, declaration binding, and occurrence hash
Preserve event occurrence and delivery identity across attempts
Bind acknowledgements to earlier deliveries and terminal outcomes
Represent protocol and capture gaps without inventing history
Recompute available receipt and embedded object hashes
Verify receipt identities, parent order, and scope bindings
Resolve approval and recovery side links without deriving authority
Reject known raw protocol secret fields without echoing values
